guide.name: Texas SandFest

guide.mission: The largest beach sand sculpture competition in the USA, supporting local nonprofit organizations and scholarships.
guide.address: 200 S. Alister Street, Suite E, Port Aransas, TX 78373

schedulePublication.holdReason: Official daily schedule currently identifies its detailed program as the 2026 schedule.

zones.name: North Gate
zones.summary: Guest Relations, ticket scan, ADA parking, wristbands.

zones.name: Competition Corridor
zones.summary: Master, duo, semi-pro, advanced amateur, and amateur sculpture areas.

zones.name: South Entrance
zones.summary: Shuttle drop-off, south beer tent, food and vendor access.

ticketOptions.name: General Admission
ticketOptions.detail: Stripe Checkout and Apple Pay handoff. Keep final prices synced from approved ticket products.

ticketOptions.name: VIP Wristbands
ticketOptions.detail: VIP checkout handoff, menus, parking pass exclusions, and will-call instructions.

ticketOptions.name: Golf Cart Raffle
ticketOptions.detail: Raffle purchase remains disabled until compliance, receipt text, and finance reconciliation rules are approved.

financeSignals.label: QuickBooks

financeSignals.label: Sponsor invoices
financeSignals.detail: Mirror payment state after QBO access is connected.

financeSignals.label: Vendor finance

financeSignals.label: Impact report
